capabilities: Establish a robust monitoring and logging framework to track AI system execution for debugging and performance enhancement.

procedure.action: Compose OpenTelemetry SDK to capture execution traces and metrics from AI components by composing module interfaces via adapter pattern; assert input/output type contracts match before connecting; assert integration_error_count < 1 after contract validation.

Initialize Fluentd to aggregate logs from all AI services and forward them to a centralized logging system by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.

Set up Prometheus to collect and store real-time metrics, and define alerting rules for anomalies using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Release Grafana dashboards to visualize execution metrics and logs for quick insights and debugging using blue-green deployment strategy; run smoke_test() against new instance before switching traffic; assert smoke_test_pass_rate >= 1.0 before promoting.
Invoke a log retention policy using Elasticsearch to ensure historical data is available for analysis.

summary: Implementing execution monitoring and observability is essential for debugging and improving AI systems by ensuring comprehensive data logging and analysis.
title: Execution Monitoring and Observability in AI Systems

failureConditions: Inability to diagnose performance issues due to lack of traceability.
Loss of critical logs leading to incomplete debugging information.
Delayed detection of system anomalies causing prolonged downtime.
Increased operational costs due to inefficient log storage.
metrics: input/output type contracts match before connecting
all required keys are present via config_validate()
successConditions: Verify OpenTelemetry traces are visible in the monitoring dashboard within 5 seconds of execution; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Ensure Fluentd forwards logs to the central system with less than 1% data loss; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Check Prometheus alerts trigger within 30 seconds of metric threshold breach; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Confirm Grafana dashboards update with new data every 10 seconds; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
